title: Chief of Staff Shared Acquisition and Attention Arbitration
summary: Completed the shared Chief of Staff acquisition slice with a normalized source-bundle contract, assistant-owned acquisition coordinator, and assistant-level attention arbiter wired through the `AI Chief of Staff` root.
next_action: Build on the new source-bundle spine for richer reactive intake and follow-on source classes when new skills need them.

verification.notes: The shared bundle and attention-arbiter slice passed targeted Chief of Staff and travel tests, and the repository later passed `mix precommit` on the completed stack.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the source-bundle coordinator, attention arbiter, and trigger-scoped `AI Chief of Staff` wiring.
resume_context.notes: The assistant root now acquires once, reasons many times, and stamps shared arbitration metadata across the Chief of Staff skill pack.

history.note: Created and immediately approved the follow-on spec for shared Chief of Staff acquisition and assistant-level attention arbitration.
Started implementation of the assistant-owned source bundle, acquisition coordinator, and arbitration layer.
Marked the shared Chief of Staff acquisition slice done after the code, tests, and runtime wiring matched the canonical spec.
